_meta.description: Researched brand_key -> anunciante (advertiser) + grupo (holding) mapping. The bridge between Aura per-brand intelligence and the Pulso/CRM deal entity (cuenta). Derived from each brand's diagnostico-9fuentes finding (primary) + web/knowledge, with provenance per row.
_meta.method: 3 parallel research agents; grounded in findings (trust finding over slug), web for ambiguous, confidence+basis+evidencia per row. No fabrication: 0 nulls, 298 alta / 22 media / 0 baja.
_meta.review_queue: rows with confidence='media' (22) and near-duplicate anunciante names (e.g. Coca-Cola FEMSA vs Coca-Cola México, Nestlé México vs Nestlé Purina) are operator data-quality calls; grupo gives the holding-level rollup.
